evaluator: fresh independent Level 2 evaluator (Copilot CLI Chief)

criteria.name: all_13_declarative_models_shared_metadata
criteria.acceptance_criterion: All 13 domain entities are defined as SQLAlchemy declarative models on shared metadata with deterministic naming convention.
evidence: Read apps/api/app/models/{__init__,base,vocab,domain}.py: Base uses MetaData(naming_convention=...), __init__ exports the domain package, and domain.py defines Provider, Category, Service, Offer, OfferVersion, Quota, RegionAvailability, Source, Snapshot, Evidence, ChangeEvent, ScanRun, ReviewItem.
Offline regression: tests/unit/test_domain_models.py passed inside scripts/test.ps1 and scripts/check.ps1; metadata table set is exactly 13 tables.

criteria.name: alembic_0003_upgrade_creates_schema
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Alembic 'upgrade head' applies migration 0003 cleanly against PostgreSQL, creating all 13 tables with FKs, check constraints, and indexes.
evidence: scripts/stack-up.ps1 exited 0; API container applied migrations and became live at http://localhost:8000/health.

Live integration test_all_domain_tables_created passed; smoke confirmed provider/service/offer/offer_version/evidence plus trigger; PK/unique indexes and constraints are present in the migration and compare cleanly against metadata.

criteria.name: downgrade_upgrade_round_trip_no_drift
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Downgrade to 0002 removes every domain table/function/trigger; subsequent upgrade head recreates identical schema with compare_metadata reporting no drift.
evidence: Live pytest test_migration_round_trip passed.
Independent adversarial probe: downgrade_0002 remaining_domain_tables=[] trigger_count=0 pass=True; reupgrade_head tables_present=True compare_metadata_diffs=0 pass=True.

criteria.name: offer_version_append_only
criteria.acceptance_criterion: offer_version is append-only: UPDATE and DELETE are rejected by a database trigger while INSERT of a new version succeeds.
evidence: Live pytest test_offer_version_is_append_only passed, including append INSERT and rejected UPDATE/DELETE.
Independent adversarial probe: update_rejected sqlstate=23001 pass=True; delete_rejected sqlstate=23001 pass=True.

criteria.name: evidence_provenance_fk_enforced
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Evidence requires valid source_id, offer_version_id, and snapshot_id; non-existent provenance references are rejected.
evidence: Read Evidence model/migration: source_id, offer_version_id, snapshot_id are NOT NULL foreign keys.
Live pytest test_evidence_requires_valid_provenance_fks passed; independent adversarial probe evidence_fk_rejected sqlstate=23503 pass=True.

criteria.name: closed_vocabulary_constraints
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Closed-vocabulary CHECK constraints reject out-of-vocabulary zero_cost_class, offer_type, and exhaustion_behaviour values using exactly docs/DATA_MODEL.md membership.
evidence: Read docs/DATA_MODEL.md and app/models/vocab.py: ZERO_COST_CLASSES has 5 values, OFFER_TYPES 11, EXHAUSTION_BEHAVIOURS 12 with matching membership.
Offline unit vocabulary tests passed; live pytest test_check_constraints_reject_out_of_vocabulary passed for zero_cost_class, offer_type, and exhaustion_behaviour.
Independent adversarial probe: zero_cost_check_rejected sqlstate=23514 pass=True.

criteria.name: alembic_target_metadata_no_drift
criteria.acceptance_criterion: migrations/env.py sets target_metadata to domain metadata; compare_metadata reports no operations after upgrade head.
evidence: Read migrations/env.py: imports app.models metadata as domain_metadata and sets target_metadata = domain_metadata with include_object=alembic_include_object.
Live pytest test_no_model_migration_drift passed; independent reupgrade probe reported compare_metadata_diffs=0.

criteria.name: representative_queries
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Representative joins Provider -> Service -> Offer -> OfferVersion and OfferVersion -> Evidence -> Source return expected seeded rows.
evidence: Live pytest test_representative_provenance_query passed: seeded provider acme, service widgets, offer_type always_free, version_number 1, source trust_level official were returned through the join.

criteria.name: stack_smoke_domain_check
criteria.acceptance_criterion: scripts/stack-smoke.{ps1,sh} pass against live stack with domain-table and immutability-trigger checks; full stack-up/smoke/down cycle succeeds.
evidence: Read scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 and scripts/stack-smoke.sh: both include Domain migration applied (0003 tables + immutability trigger).

scripts/stack-smoke.ps1 passed all 12 checks: API liveness/readiness, app_meta, worker migration, domain migration+trigger, worker/scheduler health, queue done, fresh heartbeats, web health, SPA, web API proxy; final output STACK SMOKE PASSED.
scripts/stack-down.ps1 exited 0 with STACK DOWN; docker compose ps returned no running services.

criteria.acceptance_criterion: No unsupported free-tier/zero-cost/Z0 claim, no secrets, no new managed-cloud/heavyweight dependencies, and runtime data population/Z0 engine remain deferred.
evidence: Product-truth token scan of added lines found only product name, schema/vocabulary names (zero-cost class/Z0_TRUE_FREE/always_free), tests, and column names such as free_available; no product/service assertion that a real service is free was introduced.
scripts/check.ps1 Secret scan passed; pip-audit and npm audit passed; dependency manifest diff was empty, confirming no new dependency was added.

Read current_contract out_of_scope and implementation: no provider adapters, runtime table population, API routes, worker usage, source scanning, or Z0 classification engine were added; Z0 engine remains slice 3/task 005.
